titles.title: What Shall We Do with Jesus Called Christ

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We were bound in sin Caring for nothing We never knew the road we trod was wrong Until we've heard The Message of the Hour We started then our journey all along

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now we have come to the knowledge of Him Have tasted the power, healing since we came in. What shall we do With the Message we've heard?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: What shall we do with Jesus called Christ? will we be like them who rejected this Light and departed from the Presence of Him? But as for me and my family Here will I fall and here will I stand and here will I be caught away In the Message of the Hour I will stay

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We were freed from sin Our past had been forgiven The right and wrong were laid before our eyes For us to decide steps that will be taking To serve Him or to turn our backs on HIM

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now we have come not to the mountain of fear But to Mount Zion, Stature of a perfect man Shall we go back to the darkness of sin?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: What shall we do with Jesus called Christ? Will we be like them who rejected this Light And departed from the Presence of Him? But as for me and my family Here will I fall and here will I stand And here will I be caught away In the Message of the Hour I will stay.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We were predestinated for Eternal Life No man can take us away from Him For we are engraved in His hands

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So as for me and my family Here will I fall and here will I stand And here will I be caught away In the Message of the Hour I will stay.
